name: French Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine evaporated milk, cornstarch, liquid sugar replacement, and chocolate chips in a saucepan.
2. Cook and stir the mixture until thick and the chocolate chips are melted.
3. Whip the cream cheese until light and fluffy.
4. Beat the whipped cream cheese into the chocolate/mixture.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Turn the mixture into a buttered 8-inch square baking dish.
7. Chill until firm.
8. Cut into 1-inch squares.
9. Store in the refrigerator.
